business.name: All American Home Repair LLC.
business.tagline: Complete transformations, one fix at a time

hero.headline: The fix-anything crew *Dothan* calls first
hero.subheadline: Decks, roofs, complete transformations — we handle it all and keep the job site spotless.

services_section.label: WHAT WE FIX
services_section.heading: Every project handled with care
services_section.subheading: From small repairs to complete transformations

services.title: Deck Repair & Refinishing
services.description: Repair damaged boards, replace railings, and repaint for a like-new finish. We keep your workspace clean throughout the job.

services.title: Roof & Flashing Work
services.description: Fix leaks, replace damaged shingles, and repair flashing. Proper diagnosis means lasting repairs.

services.title: Interior Renovations
services.description: Complete room makeovers, drywall repair, and custom improvements. Transform your space from top to bottom.

services.title: General Home Repairs
services.description: Doors, windows, trim work, and everything in between. One call handles all your repair needs.

about.heading: Real workmanship, fair estimates
about.body: We're a Dothan handyman team that shows up when scheduled and leaves your property cleaner than we found it. Paul and the crew handle everything from small fixes to complete home transformations.

reviews.name: katie h.
reviews.text: Amazing workmanship on our complete transformation. They do an awesome job and I highly recommend All American Home Repair!

reviews.name: Roger a.
reviews.text: First rate deck repair and repainting. Great job and kept the work site cleaned up. Will definitely use again.

reviews.name: Cory R.
reviews.text: Fair estimate, knows what he's doing. Very polite, clean, respectful. I'll always call them first - very happy customer.

cta.heading: Ready to start your project?
cta.body: Fair estimates, quality work, and a clean job site. Call Paul and the All American team today.
